'''R2-Z13''' was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] owned by a pilot named [[Koril Bekam]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] also went by the nickname '''Plug'''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{1st}}
